## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- anything intentionally left out

## Checks

- [ ] frontend lint passes
- [ ] frontend build passes
- [ ] backend lint passes
- [ ] backend build passes
- [ ] backend tests pass
- [ ] docs updated where needed

## Notes For Reviewers

- call out risky areas
- list migrations, env changes, or seeded data changes
- mention any follow-up work
